search_queries_used: site:doh.gov.ae osteoporosis screening guideline Abu Dhabi PDF
site:doh.gov.ae DEXA fracture risk falls osteoporosis
rejection_reasons: Patient pages are not clinician guidance.
Medicine protocols were outside this screening source.
Fixed intervals were not accepted without exact qualified support.
population_applicability: Partial: the DoH source primarily addresses adults over 50 and the legacy workflow has no age filter.
setting_applicability: Partial: exact for UAE primary-care screening and fracture-risk documentation, not comprehensive established-osteoporosis treatment follow-up.
UAE_applicability: Direct Abu Dhabi primary-care guidance with age, risk, and screening qualifiers retained.
recency_verification: The official DoH PDF was reviewed on 2026-07-13 and no newer official DoH replacement was identified.
superseded_check: No newer official DoH screening guideline was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped osteoporosis screening or follow-up identity with age and primary-care qualifiers retained.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines Abu Dhabi primary-care osteoporosis screening scope, primarily for adults over 50, with follow-up and treatment-effect monitoring context.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped fracture history, falls history, falls-risk assessment, previous DEXA, and clinician-arranged monitoring documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped calcium or vitamin D context, low-weight context, secondary causes, and family-history fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped clinician-reviewed DEXA fields without assigning a diagnosis.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.

unresolved_source_gaps: The unrestricted follow-up workflow does not encode the source age, sex, screening, fracture-risk, or treatment-monitoring qualifiers.

Back pain or height loss, spine tenderness, kyphosis, height, calcium or vitamin D laboratory results, renal function, medicine adherence, side effects, medication or supplement plan, falls-prevention advice, bone-health advice, vitamin D supplementation, referral, generic clinician plan, fixed intervals, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, DEXA interpretation, treatment, medicine or supplement choice and dose, referral, and follow-up timing remain clinician responsibilities.
